title: GROUP_ADD and GROUP_LEAVE not rate-limited
description: ws.rs GROUP_ADD (~line 1302) and GROUP_LEAVE (~line 1563) do not call check_rate_limit. GROUP_ADD does 4 DB ops per call; GROUP_LEAVE does 3. A subscribed client can loop at network speed with zero rate-limit cost. DESIGN.md names only broadcast/sealed_broadcast/group_send as rate-limited; GROUP_ADD and GROUP_LEAVE are absent. Fix: add check_rate_limit at the top of each handler, same as GROUP_LIST.
